# DK-OMC Chunk Manifest
# Dan Kennedy - Opportunity Marketing Concepts
# Created: 2026-03-15 | Source ID: DK-OMC

## Program Overview
Live seminar on repositioning any offer as "Opportunity" vs Improvement or Repair.
Guest speakers: Jeff Walker (Product Launch Formula), Craig (direct mail), George (76yo DM legend).

## Batch Plan (5 batches)

### BATCH DK-OMC-01 — Foundation: Pure Opportunity vs. Improvement
Files: CD/1-5 + DVD/1-2
Size: ~155KB
Themes:
- Pure Opportunity Marketers vs Niche Info Marketers (fundamental distinction)
- Repair → Improvement → Opportunity spectrum
- Prospect psychology: bored, discouraged, resigned, belief-defended
- Gullibility vs Skepticism axis
- Worker head mentality (entitlement/seniority)

### BATCH DK-OMC-02 — Psychology: Attainability & The 11 Agreements
Files: CD/6-10 + DVD/3
Size: ~165KB
Themes:
- The 11 Agreements for Attainability
- Lucy/Charlie Brown analogy (repeated failure → belief "it won't work for me")
- Before/After story technique — dramatic before is most effective
- Urgency from past loss (not just supply/demand)
- Personal story as "proof of before" (Jeff Paul in driveway weeping)

### BATCH DK-OMC-03 — Toolbox: Tangibility, Toolbox Framework, Guest Experts
Files: CD/11-15 + DVD/4-5
Size: ~170KB
Themes:
- Toolbox: 3 drawers (Product/Message, Direct Mail, Economics)
- Toaster Principle — opportunity must be tangible with a name
- "Plug-in and stay plugged" psychology
- Types of repositioning: Replacement, New Entity, Attachment
- Craig (direct mail expert) — list management, package economics
- George (DM legend, 76yo) — veteran opportunity marketing insights

### BATCH DK-OMC-04 — Direct Mail & Advanced Repositioning
Files: CD/16-20 + DVD/6-7
Size: ~195KB
Themes:
- Direct mail deep dive: envelope tests, Gary Halbert reference
- Jeff Walker Product Launch Formula sequence (50 spots, live event marketing)
- Franchise/certification model as opportunity vehicle
- Prospect research: "let them have at you" intelligence gathering
- Backend economics: customers as affiliates/resellers

### BATCH DK-OMC-05 — Economics & Synthesis
Files: DVD/8-10
Size: ~191KB
Themes:
- Jeff Walker PLF in full (product launch as opportunity vehicle)
- Reverse engineering ideal client
- LTV maximization and backend economics
- Opportunity is Reinvention (career/business reinvention frame)
- Q&A synthesis and practical applications
